text: Keep looking up... that's the secret of life.
author: Snoopy

text: Learn from yesterday, live for today, look to tomorrow, rest this afternoon.
author: Snoopy

text: Just remember, once you're over the hill you begin to pick up speed.
author: Snoopy

text: All you need is love. But a little chocolate now and then doesn't hurt.
author: Snoopy

text: Life is like a ten speed bicycle. Most of us have gears we never use.
author: Snoopy

text: In the book of life, the answers aren't in the back.
author: Charlie Brown

text: I've developed a new philosophy... I only dread one day at a time.
author: Charlie Brown

text: Sometimes I lie awake at night, and I ask, 'Where have I gone wrong?' Then a voice says to me, 'This is going to take more than one night.'
author: Charlie Brown

text: There's a difference between a philosophy and a bumper sticker.
author: Charlie Brown

text: Nothing takes the taste out of peanut butter quite like unrequited love.
author: Charlie Brown

text: I never made a mistake in my life. I thought I did once, but I was wrong.
author: Lucy Van Pelt

text: You're weak. You're a real wishy-washy person. You're dumb. You're boring. You're stupid. Other than that, you're a great person, Charlie Brown.
author: Lucy Van Pelt

text: My psychiatry booth is a place where you can receive professional help for only five cents!
author: Lucy Van Pelt

text: I know everything! I'm the smartest person in the whole world!
author: Lucy Van Pelt

text: The secret to life is to replace one worry with another.
author: Lucy Van Pelt
